entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: Hordeum vulgare L., the crop studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: HVP5CS1
entities.description: Delta-1-pyrroline-5-carboxylate synthase gene1, key gene in proline biosynthesis

entities.name: PROLINE BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of creating proline, induced by drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought stress

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: A variation in a single nucleotide that occurs at a specific position in the genome

entities.name: INSERTIONS/DELETIONS
entities.description: Genetic variations involving the addition or removal of nucleotides

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Groups of genes within an organism that were inherited together from a single parent

entities.name: HVP5CS1_H1
entities.description: A specific haplotype of the HvP5CS1 gene associated with drought tolerance

entities.name: HVP5CS1_H4
entities.description: A specific haplotype of the HvP5CS1 gene associated with drought tolerance

entities.name: TAJIMA'S D
entities.description: A statistical test used to determine if a DNA sequence is evolving neutrally

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which a species becomes better suited to its environment

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in DNA sequences between individuals of the same species
